MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-05-2023 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY CHE HASHIM, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF HUSAM ABUALSHAAR; EMILY FOWLER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. ARGUED AND THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE TO AUG-05-2024, ONCE PARTIES CONFIRM THAT ALL THEIR EXPERTS ARE AVAILABLE ON AUG-05-2024. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MOTION TO DEC-12-2023 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PARTIES TO SEND A JOINT EMAIL TO DEPARTMENT206@SFTC.ORG BY 12/08/23 CONFIRMING THAT ALL EXPERTS ARE AVAILABLE ON 08/05/24. IF THAT DATE WORKS, THEN PARTIES DO NOT NEED TO APPEAR ON 12/12/23 AND THE COURT WILL SIGN AN ORDER. IF THAT DATE DOES NOT WORK, THEN PARTIES TO MEET & CONFER ON A NEW TRIAL DATE AND APPEAR ON 12/12/23. ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Emily Fowler, Esq., Tel. 650.380.1066, for the defendant & cross-complainant Safeway, Inc.;
Karen Rai, Esq., Tel. 818.205.9955, for the cross-defendant Climate Pros, LLC;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: CROSS-DEFENDANT CLIMATE PROS, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

The matter is contested. Ms. Fowler appears to seek an earlier date for the Court to hear the motion. Discussions are held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the tentative ruling continuing the motion to August 30, 2024, is vacated. The motion is continued to August 26, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. The Court notes that any motion to continue the trial date would need to be set in Dept. 206.

Amended Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Non-Party Zuckerberg San Francisco Hospital To Produce Subpoenaed Documents
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.'S Amended Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Non-Party Zuckerberg San Francisco Hospital To Produce Subpoenaed Documents

DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR ""SAFEWAY") MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING NON-PARTY ZUCKERBERG SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL (HEREAFTER "ZSFGH") TO PRODUCE SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST ZSFGH IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS;

(1) WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, THIRD-PARTY ZSFGC IS ORDERED TO DELIVER TO THE DEPOSITION OFFICER THE DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR BY THE SUBPOENA PREVIOUSLY SERVED UPON IT ON OR ABOUT MAY 15, 2023.

(2) FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER MAY RESULT IN THE IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST ZSFGH AND A FINDING OF CONTEMPT.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
